title: Title
no_tasks: No maintenance tasks yet. Add a task or browse templates to get started.
confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this task?
import_csv_info: Upload a CSV file with the following columns (title is required, others are optional):
custom_label_hint: Custom labels are local to this integration. To use a label across Home Assistant (with colors, icons, and filtering), create it in Settings → Labels first.
tpl_desc_change_hvac_filter: Replace the HVAC air filter to maintain air quality and system efficiency.
tpl_desc_clean_air_vents: Remove dust and debris from air vents and registers throughout the home.
tpl_desc_inspect_ductwork: Check ductwork for leaks, damage, or disconnected sections.
tpl_desc_service_ac_unit: Schedule professional service for the air conditioning unit including refrigerant check.
tpl_desc_check_thermostat_calibration: Verify thermostat reads the correct temperature and adjust if needed.
tpl_desc_bleed_radiators: Release trapped air from radiators to improve heating efficiency.
tpl_desc_clean_condensate_drain_line: Flush the AC condensate drain line with vinegar to prevent clogs.
tpl_desc_check_for_leaks_under_sinks: Inspect under all sinks for signs of leaks, drips, or water damage.
tpl_desc_flush_water_heater: Drain and flush the water heater to remove sediment buildup.
tpl_desc_clean_faucet_aerators: Remove and clean faucet aerators to restore water flow and remove mineral deposits.
tpl_desc_test_sump_pump: Pour water into the sump pit to verify the pump activates and drains properly.
tpl_desc_inspect_washing_machine_hoses: Check washing machine supply hoses for bulges, cracks, or leaks.
tpl_desc_clean_garbage_disposal: Clean and deodorize the garbage disposal with ice and citrus peels.
tpl_desc_check_toilet_components: Inspect toilet flappers, fill valves, and supply lines for wear or leaks.
tpl_desc_test_gfci_outlets: Press the test and reset buttons on all GFCI outlets to verify they trip properly.
tpl_desc_check_electrical_panel: Inspect the electrical panel for signs of corrosion, overheating, or loose connections.
tpl_desc_replace_smoke_detector_batterie: Replace batteries in all smoke detectors even if they have not chirped.
tpl_desc_test_carbon_monoxide_detectors: Test all carbon monoxide detectors to confirm they are functioning correctly.
tpl_desc_inspect_extension_cords: Check all extension cords for fraying, damage, or overloading.
tpl_desc_clean_gutters: Remove leaves and debris from gutters and downspouts to prevent water damage.
tpl_desc_inspect_roof: Check roof for missing, damaged, or curling shingles and signs of wear.
tpl_desc_power_wash_siding: Power wash the exterior siding to remove dirt, mold, and mildew.
tpl_desc_check_caulking_around_windows: Inspect and replace deteriorated caulking around windows and door frames.
tpl_desc_inspect_foundation: Walk around the foundation looking for cracks, settling, or water intrusion.
tpl_desc_clean_dryer_vent: Clean the exterior dryer vent duct to prevent lint buildup and fire hazard.
tpl_desc_seal_driveway_cracks: Fill and seal cracks in the driveway to prevent water damage and further deterioration.
tpl_desc_deep_clean_carpets: Steam clean or shampoo all carpeted areas to remove deep dirt and allergens.
tpl_desc_clean_range_hood_filter: Remove and clean the range hood grease filter in hot soapy water.
tpl_desc_recaulk_bathroom: Remove old caulk and apply fresh caulk around bathtub, shower, and sink edges.
tpl_desc_check_window_locks: Test all window locks and latches to ensure they engage properly.
tpl_desc_clean_drains: Clear slow drains using a drain snake or enzyme-based cleaner.
tpl_desc_lubricate_door_hinges: Apply lubricant to all door hinges to eliminate squeaks and ensure smooth operation.
tpl_desc_clean_dishwasher: Run an empty cycle with dishwasher cleaner and wipe down the door seal.
tpl_desc_clean_washing_machine: Run a cleaning cycle with washing machine cleaner and wipe the gasket.
tpl_desc_clean_refrigerator_coils: Vacuum or brush the condenser coils on the refrigerator to maintain efficiency.
tpl_desc_replace_water_filter: Replace the refrigerator water filter cartridge for clean drinking water.
tpl_desc_clean_oven: Run the self-clean cycle or manually clean the oven interior.
tpl_desc_defrost_freezer: Defrost the freezer if ice buildup exceeds a quarter inch.
tpl_desc_clean_dryer_lint_trap_deep: Remove the lint screen and vacuum the lint trap housing to improve airflow.
tpl_desc_test_smoke_detectors: Press the test button on every smoke detector and replace any that fail.
tpl_desc_check_fire_extinguisher_pressur: Verify the pressure gauge on each fire extinguisher is in the green zone.
tpl_desc_review_emergency_plan: Review and update the household emergency plan with all family members.
tpl_desc_test_security_system: Run a full test of the home security system including all sensors and alarms.
tpl_desc_check_first_aid_kit: Inspect the first aid kit and replace any expired or used supplies.
tpl_desc_inspect_fire_escape_routes: Walk through all fire escape routes and ensure exits are clear and accessible.
tpl_desc_mow_lawn: Mow the lawn to the recommended height for the grass type.
tpl_desc_fertilize_lawn: Apply seasonal fertilizer to the lawn following product instructions.
tpl_desc_sharpen_mower_blades: Remove and sharpen or replace lawn mower blades for a clean cut.
tpl_desc_prune_shrubs: Trim and shape shrubs and hedges to maintain appearance and plant health.
tpl_desc_aerate_lawn: Aerate the lawn to reduce soil compaction and improve root growth.
tpl_desc_clean_outdoor_furniture: Wash and treat outdoor furniture to remove dirt, mold, and weather damage.
tpl_desc_inspect_irrigation_system: Check sprinkler heads, drip lines, and timers for proper operation.
tpl_desc_winterize_outdoor_faucets: Disconnect hoses, drain outdoor faucets, and install insulated covers.
tpl_desc_service_snow_blower: Change oil, check belts, and test the snow blower before winter arrives.
tpl_desc_reverse_ceiling_fan_direction: Switch ceiling fan rotation direction for the current season.
tpl_desc_check_weather_stripping: Inspect and replace worn weather stripping around doors and windows.
tpl_desc_store_or_retrieve_seasonal_item: Rotate seasonal items in and out of storage as the season changes.
tpl_desc_test_outdoor_lighting: Check all exterior lights, replace bulbs, and clean fixtures.
tpl_desc_inspect_attic_insulation: Check attic insulation for settling, moisture, or pest damage before winter.
tpl_desc_clean_window_screens: Remove window screens, wash with soapy water, and reinstall.
tpl_desc_lubricate_garage_door: Apply lubricant to garage door tracks, rollers, hinges, and springs.
tpl_desc_test_garage_door_auto_reverse: Place an object under the garage door and verify it reverses when closing.
tpl_desc_check_garage_door_weather_seal: Inspect the bottom seal and side weather stripping on the garage door.
tpl_desc_organize_garage_storage: Declutter the garage, check for expired chemicals, and reorganize storage.
tpl_desc_check_vehicle_tire_pressure: Check and adjust tire pressure on all vehicles to the recommended PSI.
tpl_desc_rotate_vehicle_tires: Rotate tires to ensure even wear and extend tire life.
tpl_desc_change_engine_oil: Change engine oil and oil filter per manufacturer recommendations.
tpl_desc_replace_windshield_wipers: Replace windshield wiper blades when streaking or skipping.
tpl_desc_test_pool_water_chemistry: Test pool pH, chlorine, alkalinity, and calcium hardness levels.
tpl_desc_clean_pool_filter: Backwash or clean the pool filter cartridge to maintain proper filtration.
tpl_desc_skim_and_vacuum_pool: Skim debris from the surface and vacuum the pool floor.
tpl_desc_inspect_pool_pump_and_motor: Check pool pump for leaks, unusual noise, and proper pressure readings.
tpl_desc_shock_treat_pool: Add pool shock treatment to eliminate bacteria and restore water clarity.
tpl_desc_clean_spa_filter: Remove, rinse, and deep clean the hot tub or spa filter cartridge.
tpl_desc_drain_and_refill_spa: Drain the hot tub completely, clean the shell, and refill with fresh water.
tpl_desc_inspect_for_termites: Check foundation, wood structures, and crawl spaces for signs of termite activity.
tpl_title_refresh_ant_and_roach_bait_sta: Refresh ant and roach bait stations
tpl_desc_refresh_ant_and_roach_bait_stat: Replace indoor and outdoor pest bait stations with fresh bait.
tpl_desc_seal_entry_points: Inspect and seal gaps around pipes, vents, and the foundation where pests can enter.
tpl_desc_check_attic_for_rodents: Inspect attic for droppings, nesting materials, or chewed wiring from rodents.
tpl_desc_clean_bird_feeders: Disassemble and scrub bird feeders to prevent mold and disease spread.
tpl_desc_replace_whole_house_water_filte: Replace the sediment and carbon filter cartridges in the whole-house water filtration system.
tpl_desc_add_salt_to_water_softener: Check and refill salt in the water softener brine tank.
tpl_desc_clean_water_softener_brine_tank: Empty, scrub, and refill the brine tank to remove salt bridges and sediment.
tpl_desc_replace_reverse_osmosis_filters: Replace pre-filter, post-filter, and membrane in the RO drinking water system.
tpl_desc_test_well_water_quality: Send a water sample to a lab for bacteria, nitrates, and mineral testing.
tpl_desc_schedule_chimney_sweep: Hire a professional to clean the chimney flue and remove creosote buildup.
tpl_desc_inspect_chimney_cap_and_flashin: Check the chimney cap for damage and inspect flashing for gaps or rust.
tpl_desc_clean_fireplace_firebox: Remove ash buildup from the firebox and inspect firebrick for cracks.
tpl_desc_check_fireplace_damper: Open and close the fireplace damper to ensure it moves freely and seals properly.
tpl_desc_pump_septic_tank: Schedule professional septic tank pumping to prevent overflow and drain field damage.
tpl_desc_inspect_septic_drain_field: Walk the drain field area checking for wet spots, odors, or lush grass patches.
tpl_desc_add_septic_treatment: Add enzyme-based septic treatment to maintain healthy bacteria levels in the tank.
tpl_desc_touch_up_interior_paint: Inspect walls for scuffs, nail holes, and chips. Touch up with matching paint.
tpl_desc_inspect_exterior_paint: Check exterior paint for peeling, cracking, or fading and schedule repainting if needed.
tpl_desc_refinish_deck_or_porch: Sand, stain, or seal the deck or porch to protect wood from weather damage.
tpl_desc_seal_grout_lines: Apply grout sealer to tile floors, backsplash, and shower areas to prevent staining.
